data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Strives to reduce the number of choices to improve decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation with intuitive user interface design.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Applies the principle to make interactive elements easy to select.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas and buttons for key actions.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes proximity, similarity, and closure for more organized user interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns and organized layout structures.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items to improve content readability and organization.
data.technical_spec: Logical groupings of tools and features within applications.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on creating memorable user interactions by enhancing peak moments and endings.
data.technical_spec: Highlighted features and smooth transitions for enhanced user experience.
